rationale: Selected 13 repos covering LangGraph (6), LangChain (3), LlamaIndex (3), OpenAI agents (2), MCP (1), CrewAI (2), custom (1). Prioritized repos that USE frameworks over framework source code itself. Included mix of official examples, course repos, community contributions, and production-oriented projects.
title: Repo selection strategy
tradeoffs: Excluded very large framework repos (langchain core, llama_index core) to focus on application-level code. Dropped TypeScript-only repos (open-agent-platform) and notebook-only repos (LangGraph-Agents-and-Workflows). Could have included more production repos but finding them via search was difficult.

rationale: Used three parallel verification agents: one for AEG001 true positive verification (read actual source for every finding), one for false negative analysis (searched 7 zero-finding repos for missed patterns), one for AEG003/HITL verification (checked compile() calls for actual budget/interrupt controls). This gives high-confidence classifications.
title: Evaluation methodology
tradeoffs: Could not verify every single AEG003 finding manually (28 in agents repo) but verified representative samples and extrapolated. Classification of arguable vs correct is subjective for subgraph/test-code findings.
